title: Rollback MR-02 Runtime Kernel Operations API

submission_evidence: operations command submission store or equivalent
scope.technical_rollback_allowed_when: Operations API has not carried production release evidence or durable business submissions beyond test tenants.
scope.evidence_retention_required_when: Operations API or legacy compatibility wrappers have recorded command submissions, GateResult evidence, or release audit evidence.

steps: Freeze new Operations API traffic and keep old Workspace/Card endpoints available for compatibility.
Revert the MR-02 runtime adapter and endpoint registration through a reviewed code rollback; do not add page-specific business write routes.
If command submissions are test-only and no release evidence depends on them, clean MR-02 shadow submissions by tenant and release scope.
If command submissions or release evidence exist, do not truncate or drop evidence tables; archive or migrate the evidence first, then apply a reviewed compensating change.
Confirm old Workspace/Card prepare and confirm routes still return their compatible payloads after rollback.
validation_steps: Run operations API contract tests and confirm rolled-back Operations routes are either intentionally unavailable or guarded by release mode.
Run command submission idempotency tests against the rollback target.
Run invariant-runner, shadow-compare-runner, gate-runner, and release-manifest-validate for the rollback evidence.
